subject: BoundedAliquotClassifier
adaptation_summary: Preserved proper-divisor accumulation and returned deficient/perfect/abundant class over a bounded scalar input.

subject: BoundedBinaryPalindromeClassifier
adaptation_summary: Converted binary palindromicity to a fixed-width 7-bit scalar comparison loop.

subject: BoundedBitTransitionClassifier
adaptation_summary: Scans fixed-width 7-bit representation and classifies adjacent bit-transition count.

subject: BoundedDivisorCountClassifier
adaptation_summary: Counts all divisors over a bounded scalar input and returns low/medium/high divisor-density class.

subject: BoundedPerfectSquareLoop
adaptation_summary: Replaces square-root helper calls with a bounded scalar search loop.

subject: BoundedPopcountDensity
adaptation_summary: Counts one bits with a scalar modulo/division loop and returns low/medium/high density class.

subject: BoundedProperDivisorParity
adaptation_summary: Preserved proper-divisor accumulation and returned parity of the proper-divisor sum.

subject: BoundedSquareFreeClassifier
adaptation_summary: Replaced collection-based prime-factor storage with a bounded square-divisor scan.
